title: BELIEF payload
description: Asserts an agent's current understanding of a shared fact. The state graph indexes beliefs by (key, agent). When two agents hold conflicting values for the same key, the divergence detector surfaces it.

value.description: The asserted value. Any JSON type. Compared structurally for divergence detection.

confidence.description: Agent's confidence in this belief. Used by the coordinator to weight resolution decisions.

source.description: How the belief was formed. 'observed' = directly read from a tool/file. 'inferred' = derived from observations. 'assumed' = no evidence, default assumption.

evidence.description: Optional. Where the belief came from (file path, tool result excerpt, prior reasoning).
